channel.title: kafka on Data Lab Tech TV
channel.description: Recent content in kafka on Data Lab Tech TV

item.title: Data Lab Infra - Part 1: Architecture Design
item.description: Learn how to design a modern data stack, built for home labs, freelancing data experts, or general on-premise needs.

item.title: MLOps: A/B Testing with MLflow, Kafka, and DuckLake
item.description: Learn how to implement an end-to-end machine learning workflow, from data ingestion, to A/B testing and monitoring, using MLflow, Kafka and DuckLake.
